title: BEL – Assistant Security Officer – 7 Posts
shortInfo: Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) Recruitment 2026 for 7 posts of Assistant Security Officer. Candidates with any graduate Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 02-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through BEL official website bel-india.in.
